    "output": "Chunk ID: 51140e\nWall time: 0.0512 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 3261\nOutput:\n# PRODUCT.md — Module Registry & Product Map\n\n**Owner:** Lalit  \n**Domain:** EntertainmentTech  \n**Last Updated:** March 2026\n\n**Architecture:** Modular Monolith — Spring Boot 3.5.11, Java 21\n\n**External Integrations:** Eventbrite (ticketing + payments + orders) | OpenAI GPT-4o (AI assistant)\n\n⚠ **Important:** This is the single source of truth for module ownership, boundaries, inter-module communication, and the Eventbrite ACL. Every agent and developer MUST read this before touching any module.\n\n---\n\n## 1. The 7 Modules — What Each One Owns\n\n### Module Ownership\n\n| Module | Owns | Must Not Own |\n|---|---|---|\n| discovery-catalog | Events, Venues, Cities, Eventbrite catalog sync | Bookings, Users, Payments |\n| scheduling | Show slots, time slot config, conflict validation, Eventbrite event sync | Bookings, Users |\n| identity | Users, JWT auth, profiles, preferences | Bookings, Payments, Events |\n| booking-inventory | Seats, SeatMap, Cart, Seat Lock State Machine, Pricing | Payments, Reviews, Users |\n| payments-ticketing | Bookings, Payments, E-Tickets, Cancellations, Refunds, Wallet | Seats (reads cart only) |\n| promotions | Coupons, Promotions, Eligibility rules, EB discount sync | Bookings, Payments, Users |\n| engagement | Reviews, Moderation, AI Chatbot, RAG pipeline | Bookings (reads attended status only) |\n\n- `admin/` — owns no domain. Orchestrates and aggregates across modules. No `@Entity` classes.\n- `shared/` — owns all external integrations (Eventbrite ACL), JWT, base classes, common DTOs.\n- `app/` — entry point only. `@SpringBootApplication`. Zero business logic.\n\n## 2. Module Dependency Order\n\n```text\nshared/               ← foundational — no dependency on any module\n    ↓\ndiscovery-catalog     ← depends on shared only\n    ↓\nscheduling            ← depends on shared + discovery-catalog (reads venue/event via REST)\n    ↓\nidentity              ← depends on shared only\n    ↓\nbooking-inventory     ← depends on shared + discovery-catalog (reads event/venue via REST)\n    ↓\npayments-ticketing    ← depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (reads via REST)\n    ↓\npromotions            ← depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (reads via REST)\n    ↓\nengagement            ← depends on shared + payments-ticketing + identity (reads via REST)\n    ↓\nadmin/                ← thin orchestration — reads from all modules, writes via REST APIs\n    ↓\napp/                  ← entry point only\n```\n\n**Rule:** A module NEVER imports from a module at the same level or below it. Dependency direction is strictly downward — no circular imports.\n\n## 3. How Modules Communicate — 3 Rules\n\n### Rule 1 — Never import another module's `@Service` or `@Repository` directly\nIf Module B needs data from Module A, it calls Module A's REST endpoint.\n\n### Rule 2 — Use Spring Events for async reactions\nWhen something important happens in Module A, it publishes a Spring `ApplicationEvent`. Other modules react by registering `@EventListener` methods. No direct calls.\n\n- booking-inventory → publishes `CartAssembledEvent`\n- payments-ticketing → listens `CartAssembledListener` → initiates payment\n\n- payments-ticketing → publishes `PaymentFailedEvent`\n- booking-inventory → listens `PaymentFailedListener` → triggers seat lock rollback\n\n- payments-ticketing → publishes `BookingConfirmedEvent`\n- engagement → listens `BookingConfirmedListener` → unlocks review eligibility\n- identity → listens `BookingConfirmedListener` → updates order history\n\n### Rule 3 — All Eventbrite API calls go through `shared/eventbrite/service/` only\nNo module ever calls Eventbrite directly. The ACL facade services are the only entry point.\nInbound Eventbrite webhooks: `EbWebhookController → EbWebhookDispatcher → dispatched as Spring Events → modules listen`.\nModules never consume the raw webhook directly.\n\n## 4. Eventbrite ACL — Facades in `shared/`\n\n### ACL Facade Services\n\n- **EbEventSyncService** (`shared/eventbrite/service/`)\n  - Create (org-scoped), update, publish, unpublish, cancel, delete events; pull org event catalog; verify sync integrity\n  \n- **EbVenueService** (`shared/eventbrite/service/`)\n  - Create venues under an org (`POST /organizations/{org_id}/venues/`); update venues (`POST /venues/{venue_id}/`); list org venues (`GET /organizations/{org_id}/venues/`); list events at a venue (`GET /venues/{venue_id}/events/`).\n  \n- **EbScheduleService** (`shared/eventbrite/service/`)\n  - Create recurring event schedules and occurrences; retrieve series info\n  \n- **EbTicketService** (`shared/eventbrite/service/`)\n  - Create/update ticket classes; manage inventory; check availability\n  \n- **EbCapacityService** (`shared/eventbrite/service/`)\n  - Retrieve and update event capacity tiers; list org seat maps; attach seat map to event\n  \n- **EbOrderService** (`shared/eventbrite/service/`)\n  - Retrieve order details post-checkout; list orders by event/org. **NO order creation via API** — orders created exclusively by Checkout Widget.\n  \n- **EbAttendeeService** (`shared/eventbrite/service/`)\n  - Retrieve attendee records; list attendees by event. **NO attendee creation via API** — attendees created by Checkout Widget.\n  \n- **EbDiscountSyncService** (`shared/eventbrite/service/`)\n  - Create/update/delete discount codes at org level; sync usage with internal promotions. (Discounts scoped to org, applied to events at checkout.)\n  \n- **EbRefundService** (`shared/eventbrite/service/`)\n  - Read refund request status only from order `refund_request` field. **NO refund submission API.**\n  \n- **EbWebhookService** (`shared/eventbrite/service/`)\n  - **NOT USED in production.** Webhook registration not available via API; only via Dashboard. Mock service simulates webhook delivery for testing.\n\n> **Note:** `EbOrderService` does NOT create orders. Orders are created exclusively by the Eventbrite Checkout Widget (JS SDK). `EbOrderService` only reads orders after the widget fires the `onOrderComplete` callback.\n\n> **Note:** `EbAttendeeService` does NOT create attendees. Attendees are created automatically when the Checkout Widget completes an order. `EbAttendeeService` only reads attendee records.\n\n> **Note:** `EbRefundService` does NOT submit refunds programmatically. Refund status is read from the order's `refund_request` field only. Actual refund initiation is handled by mimicking admin actions via Eventbrite org token (backend only).\n\n> **Note:** `EbVenueService` supports venue creation (`POST /organizations/{org_id}/venues/`) and updates (`POST /venues/{venue_id}/`). The Eventbrite API v3 exposes both endpoints. Venue creation in your app always pushes to Eventbrite and stores the returned `eb_venue_id`.\n\n### Mock Eventbrite Service — Development & Testing\n\n**Location:** `mock-eventbrite-api/` (Python FastAPI, in-memory)\n\n**Purpose:** Enable local development and integration testing without making real API calls to production Eventbrite. All 10 ACL façades route through this mock service when `spring.profiles.active=mock`.\n\n**Architecture:** Python FastAPI server (async, non-blocking) provides full mock implementations of Eventbrite API v3 endpoints. Data is stored in-memory (no database persistence by default). For integration tests, add SQLite or PostgreSQL backend to the mock service.\n\n**Endpoints Mocked:**\n- `POST/GET /organizations/{org_id}/events/` \n- `POST/GET /venues/{venue_id}/events/`\n- `GET /events/{event_id}/`\n- `POST/GET /ticket_classes/`\n- `POST/GET /inventory_tiers/`\n- `POST/GET /capacity_tiers/`\n- `POST/GET /orders/`\n- `POST/GET /attendees/`\n- `POST/GET /discounts/`\n- `POST/GET /webhooks/` (webhook registration)\n- ... and 100+ supporting endpoints\n\n**Configuration:**\n- **Spring Profile:** `mock` (Spring Boot automatically routes all ACL façade calls to mock service)\n- **Environment Variable:** `EVENTBRITE_API_URL=http://localhost:9000/v3/` (when using mock profile)\n- **Startup Command:** \n  ```bash\n  cd mock-eventbrite-api\n  python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 9000 --reload\n  ```\n\n**Trade-Offs:**\n| Aspect | Behavior |\n|---|---|\n| **Data Persistence** | In-memory; lost on shutdown. Acceptable for rapid iteration. |\n| **Latency** | Minimal (<5ms); no real network calls. |\n| **API Fidelity** | Matches Eventbrite API v3 schema exactly; test against real contract. |\n| **Concurrency** | Handles parallel requests; respects single-flight locks for testing. |\n| **Webhooks** | Simulates webhook delivery for testing event-driven flows. |\n\n**Usage Pattern:**\n- **Local Dev:** Run mock service; set `spring.profiles.active=mock` in `application-mock.properties`\n- **Integration Tests:** Use Spring `@ActiveProfiles(\"mock\")` to inject mock implementations\n- **Production:** Set `spring.profiles.active=production`; real Eventbrite API calls occur\n\n**See** `mock-eventbrite-api/README.md` **for detailed mock service documentation, sample payloads, and configuration options.**\n\n## 5. Eventbrite Integration Principles\n\n**Core Architecture:** Your internal DB is the primary source of truth. Eventbrite is the ticketing/payment backbone. Every entity is created internally first — then pushed to Eventbrite. The `eventbrite_event_id` returned from each push is stored in your DB and is the bridge between both systems.\n\n### 5.1 Internal-First, Then Eventbrite\n\nThe pattern for every flow that touches Eventbrite is always:\n\n1. User/Admin performs action in YOUR app\n2. Internal DB is updated / validated first\n3. Eventbrite API is called via `shared/` ACL facade\n4. Eventbrite returns ID or confirmation\n5. Your DB stores the Eventbrite ID (`eventbrite_event_id`, `eventbrite_order_id`, etc.)\n6. Both systems are now in sync — your DB is source of truth\n\n### 5.2 The `eventbrite_event_id` is the Spine of the System\n\nEvery downstream flow depends on `eventbrite_event_id` being present and valid in your DB:\n- FR5 (Payment) — Eventbrite Checkout Widget needs a valid `event_id` to render\n- FR6 (Cancellation) — Eventbrite cancel API needs a valid event tied to a valid order\n- FR7 (Discounts) — Eventbrite discount codes are scoped to `event_id`\n- FR8 (Reviews) — Verifying attended booking requires a confirmed Eventbrite order under that `event_id`\n- FR10 (Seat Lock) — Availability check hits Eventbrite `ticket_classes` for that `event_id`\n\nWithout FR2 sync: If `eventbrite_event_id` is null or orphaned, the entire chain breaks. No tickets can be sold, no orders created, no refunds processed.\n\n### 5.3 What Eventbrite Cannot Do — Internal Responsibilities\n\n| Gaps | Handled Internally |\n|---|---|\n| User creation/sync | No user write API on Eventbrite. Identity is 100% internal. Users are linked via order email post-purchase. |\n| Conflict validation | No conflict API on Eventbrite. Time slot conflicts and turnaround gaps are enforced in your internal DB. |\n| \"Venue creation — POST /organizations/{org_id}/venues/ is available via EbVenueService.createVenue(). Admin creates venues in your app; they are pushed to Eventbrite and eb_venue_id is stored. Venue updates via POST /venues/{venue_id}/. The Eventbrite Dashboard can also manage venues independently — VenueReconciliationJob detects and flags drift.\"|\n| Seat locking | No seat lock API on Eventbrite. The entire state machine (Redis + Spring State Machine) is internal. |\n| Cart management | No cart API on Eventbrite. Cart assembly and group discount rules are internal. |\n| Order creation | No order creation API. Orders are created exclusively via the Eventbrite Checkout Widget (JS SDK). Backend only reads orders post-creation. |\n| Attendee creation | No attendee creation API. Attendees are created automatically by Checkout Widget when orders are placed. Backend only reads attendee records. |\n| Payment processing | Eventbrite Checkout Widget handles all payments (credit card, debit, UPI, Eventbrite wallet, PayPal, etc.). Backend reads orders post-creation via EbOrderService. |\n| Single order cancel | No per-order cancel API. Only full event cancel exists. Per-order cancellation is mimicked via org admin token. |\n| Refund submission | No programmatic refund API. Refund status is embedded in order `refund_request` field only. Read-only access. |\n| Webhook registration | No webhook API. Webhooks are registered via Eventbrite Dashboard only. This app simulates webhooks for testing/development. |\n| Reviews | No reviews API on Eventbrite. Entire review system is internal. Attendance verification uses attendee read API. |\n| Public event search | `GET /events/search/` is deprecated. Event discovery is limited to your org's events. |\n\n## 6. Functional Requirement Flows — Internal + Eventbrite Sync\n\n### FR1 — City Selection → Venue Discovery → Event Listing\n**Module:** discovery-catalog\n\nThis flow provides the entry point for users browsing events. The internal catalog is the primary source. Eventbrite contributes only events your org has created — public city-wide search is not available (deprecated API).\n\n"
  }
}
```

  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_Cm3OXsZqH6yI7VuldbY07IKw",
    "output": "Chunk ID: df5e1f\nWall time: 0.0525 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1110\nOutput:\n| Package | External System | Services |\n|---|---|---|\n| `shared/eventbrite/` | Eventbrite API | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbVenueService`, `EbScheduleService`, `EbTicketService`, `EbCapacityService`, `EbOrderService`, `EbAttendeeService`, `EbDiscountSyncService`, `EbRefundService`, `EbWebhookService` |\n| `shared/openai/` | OpenAI GPT-4o | `OpenAiChatService`, `OpenAiEmbeddingService` |\n\n### Shared Common Classes\n\n| Class | Location | Purpose |\n|---|---|---|\n| `BaseEntity` | `shared/common/domain/` | `id`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` — all entities extend this |\n| `Money` | `shared/common/domain/` | Value object for all monetary amounts — never use primitives |\n| `ApiResponse<T>` | `shared/common/dto/` | Standard success response wrapper |\n| `PageResponse<T>` | `shared/common/dto/` | Paginated list wrapper |\n| `ErrorResponse` | `shared/common/dto/` | Standard error shape — all API errors use this |\n| `GlobalExceptionHandler` | `shared/common/exception/` | Single `@ControllerAdvice` for the entire app |\n| `ResourceNotFoundException` | `shared/common/exception/` | 404 — extend for module-specific not-found exceptions |\n| `BusinessRuleException` | `shared/common/exception/` | 422 — thrown when a domain rule is violated |\n| `SystemIntegrationException` | `shared/common/exception/` | 502 — external system failure |\n| `JwtTokenProvider` | `shared/security/` | JWT generation and validation |\n| `JwtAuthenticationFilter` | `shared/security/` | Spring Security filter — registered once |\n| `RedisConfig` | `shared/config/` | Redisson bean for distributed seat locking |\n| `ElasticsearchConfig` | `shared/config/` | ES client for RAG vector store |\n\n## 9. Hard Rules — Never Violate These\n\n1. `app/` has zero business logic. No `@Service`, no `@Entity`, no `@Repository`.\n2. `shared/` has zero dependency on any module. It knows nothing about bookings, users, or events.\n3. No module imports another module's `@Entity` class or `@Repository` interface.\n4. No module calls Eventbrite HTTP directly — only through `shared/eventbrite/service/`.\n5. Spring Events carry only primitive values, IDs, enums, and value objects — never `@Entity` objects.\n6. `admin/` defines no `@Entity` and owns no database table.\n7. Dependency direction is strictly downward — no circular imports between modules.\n8. One `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/common/exception/` — never add `@ControllerAdvice` in a module.\n9. Internal DB is always updated FIRST before any Eventbrite API call is made.\n10. `eventbrite_event_id` is never null in production — if null, block FR4, FR5, FR6, FR7, FR8, FR10.\n11. The Checkout Widget (JS SDK) is the ONLY way orders are created on Eventbrite — no backend order creation.\n12. Per-order cancellation and refunds use org admin token mimic — document this clearly in `EbRefundService`.\n13. Eventbrite Checkout Widget is the ONLY way payments are accepted and orders are created. No backend order creation API exists on Eventbrite. Payment processing is 100% Eventbrite-handled. Backend reads orders AFTER widget fires onOrderComplete callback via `EbOrderService`.\n\n## 10. Where to Put New Code\n\n**Java package naming:** module names with hyphens removed. Example: `booking-inventory` → `com.[org].bookinginventory`\n\n### Code Placement Guide\n\n| Need | Location |\n|---|---|\n| New REST endpoint | `[module]/api/controller/` |\n| New request/response shape | `[module]/api/dto/request/` or `response/` |\n| New business rule or domain behavior | `[module]/domain/` (no Spring annotations) |\n| New use case orchestration | `[module]/service/` |\n| New database table access | `[module]/repository/` |\n| Module needs to notify others | `[module]/event/published/` |\n| Module reacts to another | `[module]/event/listener/` |\n| Shared across 2+ modules | `shared/common/` |\n| New external system integration | `shared/[system-acl]/` (never inside a module) |\n| Admin read/aggregate view | `admin/service/` + `admin/api/controller/` |\n| New Eventbrite API call | `shared/eventbrite/service/` — add to appropriate facade only |\n\n## 11. Flyway Migration Conventions\n\n- All Flyway scripts live in `app/src/main/resources/db/migration/`\n- Naming: `V[n]__[verb]_[table].sql` — e.g. `V5__create_bookings.sql`\n- Version numbers are global across all modules — check the current highest before adding\n- Never modify an existing migration file — always add a new one\n- Table names use `snake_case`\n"
  }
}
```

`should_throw_InvalidSeatTransitionException_on_illegal_transition`\n- `should_throw_when_RELEASE_attempted_on_CONFIRMED_seat`\n\n### Layer 3 — `service/` (Mockito + Spring slices)\n\n**SlotSummaryReaderImplTest** *(scheduling module)*\n- `should_return_SlotSummaryDto_with_all_fields_mapped_when_slot_exists`\n- `should_map_orgId_from_ShowSlot_getOrganizationId`\n- `should_map_status_as_string_via_enum_name`\n- `should_throw_ResourceNotFoundException_when_slot_absent`\n\n**SlotPricingReaderImplTest** *(scheduling module)*\n- `should_return_mapped_list_of_PricingTierDto_when_tiers_exist`\n- `should_return_empty_list_when_no_tiers_for_slot`\n- `should_throw_ResourceNotFoundException_when_slot_does_not_exist`\n- `should_map_tierId_tierName_price_groupDiscount_correctly`\n\n**CartPricingServiceTest — cache-aside** *(booking-inventory module)*\n- `getSlotPricingCached_should_return_cached_list_when_redis_hit_and_not_call_reader`\n- `getSlotPricingCached_should_call_reader_and_write_cache_on_redis_miss`\n- `getSlotPricingCached_should_fallback_to_reader_when_redis_read_throws`\n- `getSlotPricingCached_should_not_propagate_exception_when_redis_write_fails`\n- `getSlotPricingCached_should_fallback_to_reader_when_cached_json_is_corrupt`\n\n**SeatAvailabilityService:**\n- `should_return_available_seats_excluding_non_expired_locks`\n- `should_include_expired_soft_locked_seats_in_available_response`\n- `should_return_ga_tier_availability_from_redis_counter`\n- `should_fallback_to_db_when_redis_counter_missing`\n- `should_mark_tier_blocked_when_redis_block_flag_set`\n\n**CartService:**\n- `should_create_new_cart_on_first_add_seat_for_user_slot`\n- `should_upsert_existing_pending_cart_on_repeat_add_seat`\n- `should_reject_add_seat_when_slot_not_ACTIVE`\n- `should_reject_add_seat_when_eb_event_id_null`\n- `should_return_409_with_alternatives_when_seat_unavailable`\n- `should_recompute_full_cart_total_on_every_add_and_remove`\n\n**CartService — Confirm:**\n- `should_publish_CartAssembledEvent_with_orgId_and_ebEventId_on_confirm`\n- `should_not_publish_CartAssembledEvent_when_confirm_fails`\n- `should_extend_cart_expires_at_to_30_min_on_hard_lock`\n\n**SeatProvisioningService:**\n- `should_bulk_insert_seats_from_venue_seat_layout_on_slot_activated`\n- `should_be_idempotent_when_seats_already_exist_for_slot`\n- `should_init_ga_redis_counters_from_tier_quotas_on_ga_slot_activated`\n\n**SlotTicketSyncServiceTest** *(updated — mocks replaced)*\n- `should_call_createTicketClasses_and_inventoryTiers_when_syncing` — stubs `SlotSummaryReader` + `SlotPricingReader`; no `SchedulingSlotClient`\n- `should_call_copySeatMap_when_seatingMode_is_RESERVED` — stubs both readers\n- `should_not_call_copySeatMap_when_seatingMode_is_GA`\n- `should_publish_TicketSyncFailedEvent_when_ticket_class_creation_fails`\n\n**ConflictResolutionService:**\n- `should_return_up_to_5_same_section_alternatives`\n- `should_return_up_to_3_adjacent_section_alternatives_when_same_section_insufficient`\n\n### Layer 4 — `api/` (`@WebMvcTest`)\n\n- `should_return_200_with_seat_map_for_active_reserved_slot`\n- `should_return_200_with_ga_tier_availability_for_active_ga_slot`\n- `should_return_503_with_EB_EVENT_NOT_SYNCED_when_eb_event_id_null`\n- `should_return_409_with_alternatives_when_seat_unavailable`\n- `should_return_200_with_group_discount_applied_in_cart_response`\n- `should_return_410_when_soft_lock_expired_at_confirm`\n- `should_return_409_when_tier_sold_out_on_eventbrite_at_confirm`\n- `should_return_503_when_eventbrite_unreachable_at_confirm`\n- `should_return_410_when_cart_expired_at_confirm`\n- `should_return_409_with_existing_cart_id_when_duplicate_cart_attempted`\n- `should_return_401_when_no_jwt_on_any_booking_endpoint`\n- `should_return_422_when_invalid_state_transition_attempted`\n\n### Layer 5 — `arch/` (ArchUnit)\n\n**`BookingInventoryArchTest` — two explicit named rules (updated):**\n- `should_not_depend_on_scheduling_domain_service_or_repository` — `noClasses().inPackage(..bookinginventory..).should().dependOnClassesThat().resideInAnyPackage(..scheduling.domain.., ..scheduling.service.., ..scheduling.repository..)` *(enforces Hard Rule #1 — no direct scheduling internals)*\n- `should_use_shared_slot_reader_contracts_not_scheduling_http_client` — `noClasses().inPackage(..bookinginventory..).should().dependOnClassesThat().haveSimpleNameEndingWith(\"SchedulingSlotClient\")` *(confirms dead client is gone)*\n\n**Other ArchUnit rules:**\n- `should_not_import_identity_entity_or_repository_in_booking_inventory`\n- `should_not_import_payments_ticketing_in_booking_inventory`\n- `should_not_call_eventbrite_http_directly_from_booking_inventory_service`\n- `should_not_declare_ControllerAdvice_in_booking_inventory`\n- `should_only_save_audit_log_no_update_or_delete`\n- `should_not_publish_CartAssembledEvent_without_orgId_and_ebEventId`\n- `should_only_publish_events_with_primitives_ids_enums_no_entities` *(Hard Rule #4)*\n- `should_enforce_mapper_layer_for_all_domain_to_dto_conversions`\n\n---\n\n## Identified Gaps & Required Changes to Other Modules\n\n> **All 5 gaps listed below were fully resolved in the pre-FR4 changes session (2026-03-04).** They are kept here for traceability. No further action required before coding FR4.\n\n### Gap 1 — `orgId` JWT claim missing ✅ RESOLVED\n\n**Problem:** Every Eventbrite call in `booking-inventory` (`CartTtlGuard`, `PaymentTimeoutWatchdog`) needs `orgId` to call `EbTokenStore.getValidToken(orgId)`. The original JWT spec only carried `sub` (userId) and `role`.\n\n**Resolution applied:**\n- `shared/.../security/JwtTokenProvider.java` — added `generateToken(Long userId, String role, Long orgId)` overload and `extractOrgId(String token)`\n- `shared/.../security/AuthenticatedUser.java` — new record `AuthenticatedUser(Long userId, String role, Long orgId)` replaces raw `Long` as `SecurityContext` principal\n- `shared/.../security/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java` — builds `AuthenticatedUser` principal from JWT claims on every request\n- All three identity controllers updated to cast principal to `AuthenticatedUser`\n\nUpdated JWT claim contract:\n\n| Claim | Value |\n|---|---|\n| `sub` | `userId` as String |\n| `role` | `USER` or `ORG_MANAGER` |\n| `orgId` | `organizationId` as Long *(added)* |\n| `iat`, `exp`, `jti`, `typ` | as per SPEC_AUTH |\n\n### Gap 2 — No access path for `ShowSlotPricingTier` data from `booking-inventory` ✅ RESOLVED\n\n**Problem:** `booking-inventory` needs `basePrice`, `groupDiscountThreshold`, `groupDiscountPercent`, and `eb_ticket_class_id` from `scheduling`'s `show_slot_pricing_tier` table.\n\n**Resolution applied (pre-FR4):**\n- `scheduling/.../api/controller/ShowSlotController.java` — added `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots/{id}/pricing-tiers` (for admin/external consumers)\n- `scheduling/.../service/ShowSlotService.java` — added `getPricingTiers(Long slotId)`\n- `scheduling/.../api/dto/response/ShowSlotPricingTierResponse.java` — added `ebInventoryTierId`, `groupDiscountThreshold`, `groupDiscountPercent` fields\n\n**Superseded by interface migration (2026-03-04):**\n- `booking-inventory` **no longer calls the REST endpoint** — it uses `SlotPricingReader` (in-process `@Service` bean in `scheduling`, injected via shared interface)\n- `CartPricingService.getSlotPricingCached(Long slotId)` provides cache-aside (`StringRedisTemplate`, JSON via `ObjectMapper`, TTL 10 min, key `pricing:slot:{slotId}`) for the hot path\n- The REST endpoint is preserved and continues to serve admin and any future external consumers\n- `SchedulingSlotClient`, `SchedulingSlotResponse`, `SchedulingPricingTierResponse` deleted from `booking-inventory`\n\n### Gap 3 — No REST endpoint for venue seat layout ✅ RESOLVED\n\n**Problem:** `SeatProvisioningService` needs the venue's physical floor plan to create `Seat` rows.\n\n**Resolution applied:**\n- `discovery-catalog/.../domain/VenueSeat.java` — new JPA entity (table: `venue_seat`, V18 migration)\n- `discovery-catalog/.../repository/VenueSeatRepository.java` — `findByVenueId`, `findByVenueIdAndTierName`, `countByVenueId`\n- `discovery-catalog/.../api/controller/VenueCatalogController.java` — added `GET /api/v1/catalog/venues/{venueId}/seat-layout`\n- `discovery-catalog/.../service/VenueCatalogService.java` — added `getVenueSeatLayout(Long venueId)`\n- Response DTOs: `VenueSeatResponse`, `VenueSeatLayoutResponse`\n\n### Gap 4 — `CartAssembledEvent` payload insufficient ✅ RESOLVED\n\n**Problem:** Event only had `cartId` and `slotId`. `payments-ticketing` needs `orgId` and `ebEventId`.\n\n**Resolution applied:**\n```java\n// shared/.../event/published/CartAssembledEvent.java\npublic record CartAssembledEvent(\n    Long cartId,\n    Long slotId,\n    Long userId,\n    Long orgId,\n    String ebEventId,\n    String couponCode   // nullable\n) {}\n```\n\n### Gap 5 — `GroupDiscountRule` ownership conflict ✅ RESOLVED\n\n**Problem:** Two places defined group discount data. Ownership was ambiguous.\n\n**Resolution applied:**\n- `show_slot_pricing_tier` in `scheduling` is the single authoritative source (V17 migration added `group_discount_threshold` and `group_discount_percent` columns)\n- `ShowSlotPricingTier` entity's `setGroupDiscount()` domain method enforces validation rules\n- `GroupDiscountRule` in `booking-inventory` (V23 migration) remains a **denormalized local copy** populated at provisioning time from REST data — not a separate source of truth\n- No separate `PricingTier` entity in `booking-inventory`\n\n---\n\n## Finalized Decisions\n\n| Decision | Value |\n|---|---|\n| State machine persistence | Rebuilt from DB on each call — no SSM Redis persistence |\n| Redis role | Authoritative real-time lock; DB is durable mirror; Redis loss → fallback to `SELECT FOR UPDATE` |\n| EB call placement | Inline only at confirm (SOFT→HARD) — once per cart; never on seat click |\n| Availability source | Internal DB only on hot path; background job detects EB drift |\n| GA model | `GaInventoryClaim` + Redis atomic counter — no phantom seat rows |\n| Group discount ownership | `show_slot_pricing_tier` (scheduling) authoritative; denormalized into `group_discount_rules` (booking-inventory) at provisioning via `SlotPricingReader`; hot-path cache via `CartPricingService.getSlotPricingCached()` |\n| Scheduling data access | In-process `SlotSummaryReader` + `SlotPricingReader` shared interfaces (not REST HTTP); implemented in `scheduling`, injected into `booking-inventory` |\n| Pricing tier cache | `CartPricingService.getSlotPricingCached()` — key `pricing:slot:{slotId}`, TTL 10 min, `StringRedisTemplate` + `ObjectMapper` JSON; Redis failure → transparent fallback to reader, no exception propagated |\n| Audit log | Append-only, every transition, no exceptions |\n| JWT `orgId` claim | Must be added to `JwtTokenProvider` (update SPEC_AUTH) |\n| Seat provisioning source | `discovery-catalog` `VenueSeat` floor plan — not Eventbrite |\n| Cart uniqueness | Partial UNIQUE index on `(user_id, show_slot_id) WHERE status = 'PENDING'` |\n| Flyway version range | V19–V24 (`seats`, `ga_inventory_claims`, `carts`, `cart_items`, `group_discount_rules`, `seat_lock_audit_log`). V17 and V18 were consumed by pre-FR4 changes. |\n\n---\n\n## Inter-Module Event Map (FR4 additions)\n\n| Publisher | Event | Consumer | Payload | Purpose |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n| `scheduling` | `ShowSlotActivatedEvent` | `booking-inventory` | `slotId, ebEventId, orgId, venueId, cityId, seatingMode` | Slot ACTIVE → provision seats (RESERVED) or init GA counters |\n| `scheduling` | `ShowSlotCancelledEvent` | `booking-inventory` | `slotId, orgId` | Slot cancelled → release ALL seats regardless of lock state |\n| `booking-inventory` | `CartAssembledEvent` | `payments-ticketing` | `cartId, slotId, userId, orgId, ebEventId, couponCode` | Cart confirmed → initiate Eventbrite checkout widget |\n| `booking-inventory` | `PaymentTimeoutEvent` | `payments-ticketing` | `cartId, List<seatId>, userId` | Watchdog: expired lock with no order → mark booking abandoned |\n| `payments-ticketing` | `PaymentFailedEvent` | `booking-inventory` | `cartId, List<seatId>, userId` | Widget closed without completion → release seat locks |\n| `payments-ticketing` | `BookingConfirmedEvent` | `booking-inventory` | `cartId, List<seatId>, ebOrderId, userId` | Order placed → transition seats to CONFIRMED, store `eb_order_id` |\n"
  }
}
```

CartAssembledEvent(\n    Long cartId,\n    Long slotId,\n    Long userId,\n    Long orgId,\n    String ebEventId,\n    String couponCode   // nullable\n) {}\n```\n\n### Gap 5 — `GroupDiscountRule` ownership conflict ✅ RESOLVED\n\n**Problem:** Two places defined group discount data. Ownership was ambiguous.\n\n**Resolution applied:**\n- `show_slot_pricing_tier` in `scheduling` is the single authoritative source (V17 migration added `group_discount_threshold` and `group_discount_percent` columns)\n- `ShowSlotPricingTier` entity's `setGroupDiscount()` domain method enforces validation rules\n- `GroupDiscountRule` in `booking-inventory` (V23 migration) remains a **denormalized local copy** populated at provisioning time from REST data — not a separate source of truth\n- No separate `PricingTier` entity in `booking-inventory`\n\n---\n\n## Finalized Decisions\n\n| Decision | Value |\n|---|---|\n| State machine persistence | Rebuilt from DB on each call — no SSM Redis persistence |\n| Redis role | Authoritative real-time lock; DB is durable mirror; Redis loss → fallback to `SELECT FOR UPDATE` |\n| EB call placement | Inline only at confirm (SOFT→HARD) — once per cart; never on seat click |\n| Availability source | Internal DB only on hot path; background job detects EB drift |\n| GA model | `GaInventoryClaim` + Redis atomic counter — no phantom seat rows |\n| Group discount ownership | `show_slot_pricing_tier` (scheduling) authoritative; denormalized into `group_discount_rules` (booking-inventory) at provisioning via `SlotPricingReader`; hot-path cache via `CartPricingService.getSlotPricingCached()` |\n| Scheduling data access | In-process `SlotSummaryReader` + `SlotPricingReader` shared interfaces (not REST HTTP); implemented in `scheduling`, injected into `booking-inventory` |\n| Pricing tier cache | `CartPricingService.getSlotPricingCached()` — key `pricing:slot:{slotId}`, TTL 10 min, `StringRedisTemplate` + `ObjectMapper` JSON; Redis failure → transparent fallback to reader, no exception propagated |\n| Audit log | Append-only, every transition, no exceptions |\n| JWT `orgId` claim | Must be added to `JwtTokenProvider` (update SPEC_AUTH) |\n| Seat provisioning source | `discovery-catalog` `VenueSeat` floor plan — not Eventbrite |\n| Cart uniqueness | Partial UNIQUE index on `(user_id, show_slot_id) WHERE status = 'PENDING'` |\n| Flyway version range | V19–V24 (`seats`, `ga_inventory_claims`, `carts`, `cart_items`, `group_discount_rules`, `seat_lock_audit_log`). V17 and V18 were consumed by pre-FR4 changes. |\n\n---\n\n## Inter-Module Event Map (FR4 additions)\n\n| Publisher | Event | Consumer | Payload | Purpose |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n| `scheduling` | `ShowSlotActivatedEvent` | `booking-inventory` | `slotId, ebEventId, orgId, venueId, cityId, seatingMode` | Slot ACTIVE → provision seats (RESERVED) or init GA counters |\n| `scheduling` | `ShowSlotCancelledEvent` | `booking-inventory` | `slotId, orgId` | Slot cancelled → release ALL seats regardless of lock state |\n| `booking-inventory` | `CartAssembledEvent` | `payments-ticketing` | `cartId, slotId, userId, orgId, ebEventId, couponCode` | Cart confirmed → initiate Eventbrite checkout widget |\n| `booking-inventory` | `PaymentTimeoutEvent` | `payments-ticketing` | `cartId, List<seatId>, userId` | Watchdog: expired lock with no order → mark booking abandoned |\n| `payments-ticketing` | `PaymentFailedEvent` | `booking-inventory` | `cartId, List<seatId>, userId` | Widget closed without completion → release seat locks |\n| `payments-ticketing` | `BookingConfirmedEvent` | `booking-inventory` | `cartId, List<seatId>, ebOrderId, userId` | Order placed → transition seats to CONFIRMED, store `eb_order_id` |\n"
  }
}
```

BaseEntity {\n\n    @Column(name = \"user_id\", nullable = false)\n    private Long userId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"show_slot_id\", nullable = false)\n    private Long showSlotId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"org_id\", nullable = false)\n    private Long orgId;\n\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\n    @Column(name = \"seating_mode\", nullable = false)\n    private SeatingMode seatingMode;\n\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\n    @Column(name = \"status\", nullable = false)\n    private CartStatus status;\n\n    @Column(name = \"expires_at\", nullable = false)\n    private Instant expiresAt;\n\n    @Column(name = \"coupon_code\")\n    private String couponCode;\n\n    @Embedded\n    @AttributeOverrides({\n        @AttributeOverride(name = \"amount\", column = @Column(name = @OneToMany(mappedBy = \"cart\", cascade = CascadeType.ALL, orphanRemoval = true)\n    private List<CartItem> items = new ArrayList<>();\n\n    protected Cart() {\n    }\n\n    public Cart(Long userId, Long showSlotId, Long orgId, SeatingMode seatingMode, Duration ttl, String currency) {\n        this.userId = userId;\n        this.showSlotId = showSlotId;\n        this.orgId = orgId;\n        this.seatingMode = seatingMode;\n        this.status = CartStatus.PENDING;\n        this.expiresAt = Instant.now().plus(ttl);\n        this.discountAmount = new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, currency);\n    }\n\n    public void addItem(CartItem item) {\n        item.attachTo(this);\n        this.items.add(item);\n    }\n\n    public void removeItem(CartItem item) {\n        this.items.remove(item);\n        item.detach();\n    }\n\n    public void confirm() {\n        this.status = CartStatus.CONFIRMED;\n    }\n\n    public void abandon() {\n        this.status = CartStatus.ABANDONED;\n    }\n\n    public void expire() {\n        this.status = CartStatus.EXPIRED;\n    }\n\n    public boolean isExpired(Instant now) {\n        return !this.expiresAt.isAfter(now);\n    }\n\n    public void ensurePending() {\n        if (status != CartStatus.PENDING) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Cart is not pending\", \"CART_NOT_PENDING\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    public void extendTtl(Duration ttl) {\n        this.expiresAt = Instant.now().plus(ttl);\n    }\n\n    public void setDiscountAmount(Money discountAmount) {\n        this.discountAmount = discountAmount;\n    }\n\n    public Long getUserId() {\n        return userId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getShowSlotId() {\n        return showSlotId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getOrgId() {\n        return orgId;\n    }\n\n    public SeatingMode getSeatingMode() {\n        return seatingMode;\n    }\n\n    public CartStatus getStatus() {\n        return status;\n    }\n\n    public Instant getExpiresAt() {\n        return expiresAt;\n    }\n\n    public String getCouponCode() {\n        return couponCode;\n    }\n\n    public void setCouponCode(String couponCode) {\n        this.couponCode = couponCode;\n    }\n\n    public Money getDiscountAmount() {\n        return discountAmount;\n    }\n\n    public List<CartItem> getItems() {\n        return Collections.unmodifiableList(items);\n    }\n}\n"

= seatId;\n        this.gaClaimId = gaClaimId;\n        this.pricingTierId = pricingTierId;\n        this.ebTicketClassId = ebTicketClassId;\n        this.basePrice = basePrice;\n        this.quantity = quantity;\n    }\n\n    void attachTo(Cart cart) {\n        this.cart = cart;\n    }\n\n    void detach() {\n        this.cart = null;\n    }\n\n    public Cart getCart() {\n        return cart;\n    }\n\n    public Long getSeatId() {\n        return seatId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getGaClaimId() {\n        return gaClaimId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getPricingTierId() {\n        return getQuantity() {\n        return quantity;\n    }\n}\n"

    "output": "Chunk ID: 4d66fa\nWall time: 0.0509 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1673\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Cart;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.CartItem;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.GroupDiscountRule;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.GroupDiscountRuleRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.PricingTierDto;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.SlotPricingReader;\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException;\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.core.type.TypeReference;\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\nimport java.math.RoundingMode;\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.util.HashMap;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.function.Function;\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Qualifier;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.StringRedisTemplate;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\n\n@Service\npublic class CartPricingService {\n\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CartPricingService.class);\n    private static final Duration PRICING_CACHE_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(10);\n\n    public record CartPricingResult(\n        Money subtotal,\n        Money discount,\n        Money total,\n        Map<Long, Money> itemDiscounts\n    ) {\n    }\n\n    private final GroupDiscountRuleRepository groupDiscountRuleRepository;\n    private final SlotPricingReader slotPricingReader;\n    private final StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate;\n    private final ObjectMapper redisObjectMapper;\n\n    public CartPricingService(\n        GroupDiscountRuleRepository groupDiscountRuleRepository,\n        SlotPricingReader slotPricingReader,\n        StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate,\n        @Qualifier(\"redisObjectMapper\") ObjectMapper redisObjectMapper\n    ) {\n        this.groupDiscountRuleRepository = groupDiscountRuleRepository;\n        this.slotPricingReader = slotPricingReader;\n        this.stringRedisTemplate = stringRedisTemplate;\n        this.redisObjectMapper = redisObjectMapper;\n    }\n\n    public List<PricingTierDto> getSlotPricingCached(Long slotId) {\n        String key = pricingCacheKey(slotId);\n\n        try {\n            String cachedJson = stringRedisTemplate.opsForValue().get(key);\n            if (cachedJson != null && !cachedJson.isBlank()) {\n                return redisObjectMapper.readValue(cachedJson, new TypeReference<List<PricingTierDto>>() {\n                });\n            }\n        } catch (JsonProcessingException ex) {\n            log.warn(\"Failed to deserialize pricing cache. slotId={} reason={}\", slotId, ex.getMessage());\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            log.warn(\"Failed to read pricing cache. slotId={} reason={}\", slotId, ex.getMessage());\n        }\n\n        List<PricingTierDto> pricing = slotPricingReader.getSlotPricing(slotId);\n\n        try {\n            String payload = redisObjectMapper.writeValueAsString(pricing);\n            stringRedisTemplate.opsForValue().set(key, payload, PRICING_CACHE_TTL);\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            log.warn(\"Failed to write pricing cache. slotId={} reason={}\", slotId, ex.getMessage());\n        }\n\n        return pricing;\n    }\n\n    public CartPricingResult recompute(Cart cart, List<CartItem> items) {\n        if (items.isEmpty()) {\n            Money zero = new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, cart.getDiscountAmount().currency());\n            cart.setDiscountAmount(zero);\n            return new CartPricingResult(zero, zero, zero, Map.of());\n        }\n\n        String currency = items.getFirst().getBasePrice().currency();\n        BigDecimal subtotalAmount = items.stream()\n            .map(this::lineAmount)\n            .reduce(BigDecimal.ZERO, BigDecimal::add);\n\n        Map<Long, List<CartItem>> byTier = items.stream().collect(Collectors.groupingBy(CartItem::getPricingTierId));\n        Map<Long, GroupDiscountRule> rulesByTier = groupDiscountRuleRepository.findByShowSlotId(cart.getShowSlotId()).stream()\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(GroupDiscountRule::getPricingTierId, Function.identity(), (a, b) -> a));\n\n        BigDecimal totalDiscount = BigDecimal.ZERO;\n        Map<Long, Money> itemDiscounts = new HashMap<>();\n\n        for (Map.Entry<Long, List<CartItem>> entry : byTier.entrySet()) {\n            Long tierId = entry.getKey();\n            List<CartItem> tierItems = entry.getValue();\n            GroupDiscountRule rule = rulesByTier.get(tierId);\n            if (rule == null || rule.getGroupDiscountThreshold() == null || rule.getGroupDiscountPercent() == null) {\n                tierItems.forEach(item -> itemDiscounts.put(item.getId(), new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, currency)));\n                continue;\n            }\n\n            int count = tierItems.stream().mapToInt(CartItem::getQuantity).sum();\n            if (count < rule.getGroupDiscountThreshold()) {\n                tierItems.forEach(item -> itemDiscounts.put(item.getId(), new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, currency)));\n                continue;\n            }\n\n            BigDecimal tierSubtotal = tierItems.stream().map(this::lineAmount).reduce(BigDecimal.ZERO, BigDecimal::add);\n            BigDecimal tierDiscount = tierSubtotal\n                .multiply(rule.getGroupDiscountPercent())\n                .divide(new BigDecimal(\"100\"), 2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP);\n            totalDiscount = totalDiscount.add(tierDiscount);\n\n            for (CartItem item : tierItems) {\n                BigDecimal ratio = tierSubtotal.signum() == 0\n                    ? BigDecimal.ZERO\n                    : lineAmount(item).divide(tierSubtotal, 8, RoundingMode.HALF_UP);\n                BigDecimal itemDiscount = tierDiscount.multiply(ratio).setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP);\n                itemDiscounts.put(item.getId(), new Money(itemDiscount, currency));\n            }\n        }\n\n        Money subtotal = new Money(subtotalAmount.setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP), currency);\n        Money discount = new Money(totalDiscount.setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP), currency);\n        Money total = new Money(subtotal.amount().subtract(discount.amount()).setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP), currency);\n        cart.setDiscountAmount(discount);\n\n        return new CartPricingResult(subtotal, discount, total, itemDiscounts);\n    }\n\n    private String pricingCacheKey(Long slotId) {\n        return \"pricing:slot:\" + slotId;\n    }\n\n    private BigDecimal lineAmount(CartItem item) {\n        return item.getBasePrice().amount().multiply(BigDecimal.valueOf(item.getQuantity()));\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_6M2RI9ZfWhiHR5y0pJ0tlkmx",
    "output": "Chunk ID: f21461\nWall time: 0.0519 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 238\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.statemachine.guard;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Seat;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.redis.SeatLockRedisService;\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\n\n@Component\npublic class AvailabilityGuard {\n\n    private final SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService;\n\n    public AvailabilityGuard(SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService) {\n        this.seatLockRedisService = seatLockRedisService;\n    }\n\n    public boolean canSelect(Seat seat, Long userId, Duration ttl) {\n        if (!seat.isSelectable(Instant.now())) {\n            return false;\n        }\n        SeatLockRedisService.AcquireResult result = seatLockRedisService.acquire(seat.getId(), userId, ttl);\n        return result == SeatLockRedisService.AcquireResult.ACQUIRED || result == SeatLockRedisService.AcquireResult.ALREADY_YOURS;\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 92
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T14:16:39.086Z
**Role/Type:** response_item

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T14:16:39.086Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_NsgZOLDih9VnBcLHILBhlU3S",
    "output": "Chunk ID: a56cca\nWall time: 0.0510 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 349\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.statemachine.guard;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Cart;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.CartItem;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.exception.CartExpiredException;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.exception.SoftLockExpiredException;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.redis.SeatLockRedisService;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Objects;\nimport java.util.Set;\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\n\n@Component\npublic class CartTtlGuard {\n\n    private final SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService;\n\n    public CartTtlGuard(SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService) {\n        this.seatLockRedisService = seatLockRedisService;\n    }\n\n    public void assertCartConfirmable(Cart cart, List<CartItem> items, Long userId) {\n        if (cart.isExpired(Instant.now())) {\n            throw new CartExpiredException(cart.getId(), cart.getExpiresAt());\n        }\n        Set<Long> expired = items.stream()\n            .map(CartItem::getSeatId)\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\n            .filter(seatId -> !seatLockRedisService.isOwnedBy(seatId, userId))\n            .collect(Collectors.toSet());\n        if (!expired.isEmpty()) {\n            throw new SoftLockExpiredException(expired);\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

{

    "call_id": "call_8a2Lisz35gyB5X6Q7t07T91m",
    "output": "Chunk ID: a437fc\nWall time: 0.0518 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 640\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.statemachine;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Seat;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.SeatLockEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.SeatLockState;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.statemachine.action.ConfirmAction;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.statemachine.action.HardLockAction;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.statemachine.action.PaymentPendingAction;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.statemachine.action.ReleaseAction;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.statemachine.action.SoftLockAction;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\n\n@Service\npublic class SeatLockStateMachineService {\n\n    private final SeatLockStateMachineConfig config;\n    private final SoftLockAction softLockAction;\n    private final HardLockAction hardLockAction;\n    private final PaymentPendingAction paymentPendingAction;\n    private final ConfirmAction confirmAction;\n    private final ReleaseAction releaseAction;\n\n    public SeatLockStateMachineService(\n        SeatLockStateMachineConfig config,\n        SoftLockAction softLockAction,\n        HardLockAction hardLockAction,\n        PaymentPendingAction paymentPendingAction,\n        ConfirmAction confirmAction,\n        ReleaseAction releaseAction\n    ) {\n        this.config = config;\n        this.softLockAction = softLockAction;\n        this.hardLockAction = hardLockAction;\n        this.paymentPendingAction = paymentPendingAction;\n        this.confirmAction = confirmAction;\n        this.releaseAction = releaseAction;\n    }\n\n    public void sendEvent(Seat seat, SeatLockEvent event, SeatActionContext context) {\n        SeatLockState next = config.nextState(seat.getLockState(), event);\n        if (next == null) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\n                \"Invalid seat transition: \" + seat.getLockState() + \" -> \" + event,\n                \"INVALID_SEAT_TRANSITION\"\n            );\n        }\n        switch (event) {\n            case SELECT -> softLockAction.apply(seat, context);\n            case CONFIRM -> hardLockAction.apply(seat, context);\n            case CHECKOUT_INITIATE -> paymentPendingAction.apply(seat, context);\n            case CONFIRM_PAYMENT -> confirmAction.apply(seat, context);\n            case RELEASE -> releaseAction.apply(seat, context);\n        }\n    }\n\n    public record SeatActionContext(Long userId, String orderId, String reason) {\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.BaseEntity;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\nimport jakarta.persistence.Column;\nimport jakarta.persistence.Entity;\nimport jakarta.persistence.EnumType;\nimport jakarta.persistence.Enumerated;\nimport jakarta.persistence.Table;\nimport jakarta.persistence.UniqueConstraint;\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.time.Instant;\n\n@Entity\n@Table(name = \"seats\", uniqueConstraints = @UniqueConstraint(name = \"uq_seat_position\", columnNames = {\"show_slot_id\", \"seat_number\"}))\npublic class Seat extends BaseEntity {\n\n    @Column(name = \"show_slot_id\", nullable = false)\n    private Long showSlotId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"pricing_tier_id\", nullable = false)\n    private Long pricingTierId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"eb_ticket_class_id\", nullable = false)\n    private String ebTicketClassId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"seat_number\", nullable = false)\n    private String seatNumber;\n\n    @Column(name = \"row_label\")\n    private String rowLabel;\n\n    @Column(name = \"section\")\n    private String section;\n\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\n    @Column(name = \"lock_state\", nullable = false)\n    private SeatLockState lockState;\n\n    @Column(name = \"locked_by_user_id\")\n    private Long lockedByUserId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"locked_until\")\n    private Instant lockedUntil;\n\n    @Column(name = \"eb_order_id\")\n    private String ebOrderId;\n\n    protected Seat() {\n    }\n\n    public Seat(Long showSlotId, Long pricingTierId, String ebTicketClassId, String seatNumber, String rowLabel, String section) {\n        this.showSlotId = showSlotId;\n        this.pricingTierId = pricingTierId;\n        this.ebTicketClassId = ebTicketClassId;\n        this.seatNumber = seatNumber;\n        this.rowLabel = rowLabel;\n        this.section = section;\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.AVAILABLE;\n    }\n\n    public void softLock(Long userId, Duration ttl) {\n        if (!isSelectable(Instant.now())) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat is not available for soft lock\", \"SEAT_UNAVAILABLE\");\n        }\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED;\n        this.lockedByUserId = userId;\n        this.lockedUntil = Instant.now().plus(ttl);\n    }\n\n    public void hardLock(Duration ttl) {\n        if (this.lockState != SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat is not soft-locked\", \"INVALID_SEAT_TRANSITION\");\n        }\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED;\n        this.lockedUntil = Instant.now().plus(ttl);\n    }\n\n    public void markPaymentPending() {\n        if (this.lockState != SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat is not hard-locked\", \"INVALID_SEAT_TRANSITION\");\n        }\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.PAYMENT_PENDING;\n    }\n\n    public void confirm(String orderId) {\n        if (this.lockState != SeatLockState.PAYMENT_PENDING && this.lockState != SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat cannot be confirmed from current state\", \"INVALID_SEAT_TRANSITION\");\n        }\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.CONFIRMED;\n        this.ebOrderId = orderId;\n        this.lockedByUserId = null;\n        this.lockedUntil = null;\n    }\n\n    public void release(LockReleaseReason reason) {\n        if (this.lockState == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Confirmed seat cannot be released\", \"SEAT_ALREADY_CONFIRMED\");\n        }\n        this.lockState = SeatLockState.AVAILABLE;\n        this.lockedByUserId = null;\n        this.lockedUntil = null;\n    }\n\n    public boolean isSelectable(Instant now) {\n        if (this.lockState == SeatLockState.AVAILABLE) {\n            return true;\n        }\n        return this.lockState == SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED\n            && this.lockedUntil != null\n            && this.lockedUntil.isBefore(now);\n    }\n\n    public Long getShowSlotId() {\n        return showSlotId;\n    }\n\n    public Long getPricingTierId() {\n        return pricingTierId;\n    }\n\n    public String getEbTicketClassId() {\n        return ebTicketClassId;\n    }\n\n    public String getSeatNumber() {\n        return seatNumber;\n    }\n\n    public String getRowLabel() {\n        return rowLabel;\n    }\n\n    public String getSection() {\n        return section;\n    }\n\n    public SeatLockState getLockState() {\n        return lockState;\n    }\n\n    public Long getLockedByUserId() {\n        return lockedByUserId;\n    }\n\n    public Instant getLockedUntil() {\n        return lockedUntil;\n    }\n\n    public String getEbOrderId() {\n        return ebOrderId;\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.mapper.CartMapper;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.CartItemRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.redis.SeatLockRedisService;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.redis.SeatLockRedisService.AcquireResult;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.PricingTierDto;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.SlotSummaryDto;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CartAssembledEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.PaymentTimeoutEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BaseException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbTicketClassResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbAuthException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTicketService;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTokenStore;\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport java.util.ArrayList;\nimport java.util.HashMap;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Objects;\nimport java.util.Set;\nimport java.util.function.Function;\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\nimport org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.StringRedisTemplate;\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n@Service\npublic class CartService {\n\n    private static final Duration SOFT_LOCK_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(5);\n    private static final Duration HARD_LOCK_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(30);\n\n    private final CartRepository cartRepository;\n    private final CartItemRepository cartItemRepository;\n    private final SeatRepository seatRepository;\n    private final GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository;\n    private final SeatLockAuditLogRepository seatLockAuditLogRepository;\n    private final SlotValidationService slotValidationService;\n    private final SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService;\n    private final GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService;\n    private final CartPricingService cartPricingService;\n    private final ConflictResolutionService conflictResolutionService;\n    private final CartMapper cartMapper;\n    private final EbTicketService ebTicketService;\n    private final EbTokenStore ebTokenStore;\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\n    private final StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate;\n\n    public CartService(\n        CartRepository cartRepository,\n        CartItemRepository cartItemRepository,\n        SeatRepository seatRepository,\n        GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository,\n        SeatLockAuditLogRepository seatLockAuditLogRepository,\n        SlotValidationService slotValidationService,\n        SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService,\n        GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService,\n        CartPricingService cartPricingService,\n        ConflictResolutionService conflictResolutionService,\n        CartMapper cartMapper,\n        EbTicketService ebTicketService,\n        EbTokenStore ebTokenStore,\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher,\n        StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate\n    ) {\n        this.cartRepository = cartRepository;\n        this.cartItemRepository = cartItemRepository;\n        this.seatRepository = seatRepository;\n        this.gaInventoryClaimRepository = gaInventoryClaimRepository;\n        this.seatLockAuditLogRepository = seatLockAuditLogRepository;\n        this.slotValidationService = slotValidationService;\n        this.seatLockRedisService = seatLockRedisService;\n        this.gaInventoryRedisService = gaInventoryRedisService;\n        this.cartPricingService = cartPricingService;\n        this.conflictResolutionService = conflictResolutionService;\n        this.cartMapper = cartMapper;\n        this.ebTicketService = ebTicketService;\n        this.ebTokenStore = ebTokenStore;\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\n        this.stringRedisTemplate = stringRedisTemplate;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CartResponse addSeat(Long userId, Long orgId, String role, AddSeatRequest request) {\n        slotValidationService.ensureUserActive(role);\n        SlotSummaryDto slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(request.slotId());\n        List<PricingTierDto> tiers = cartPricingService.getSlotPricingCached(request.slotId());\n        Map<Long, PricingTierDto> tierById = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(PricingTierDto::tierId, Function.identity()));\n\n        PricingTierDto tier = tierById.get(request.tierId());\n        if (tier == null) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Pricing tier not found for slot\", \"TIER_NOT_FOUND\");\n        }\n        slotValidationService.ensureTierSynced(request.tierId(), tier.ebTicketClassId());\n        assertOrgConnected(orgId);\n\n        Cart cart = getOrCreatePendingCart(userId, slot, orgId, tier.price().currency());\n\n        if (slot.seatingMode() == com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode.RESERVED) {\n            if (request.seatId() == null) {\n                throw new BusinessRuleException(\"seatId is required for RESERVED mode\", \"SEAT_ID_REQUIRED\");\n            }\n            addReservedSeat(userId, cart, tierById, request, tier);\n        } else {\n            addGaTier(userId, cart, request, tier);\n        }\n\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CartResponse removeItem(Long userId, Long itemId) {\n        CartItem item = cartItemRepository.findByIdAndCartUserId(itemId, userId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CartItemNotFoundException(itemId));\n\n        Cart cart = item.getCart();\n        if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId())\n                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat not found\", \"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\"));\n            if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED\n                || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.PAYMENT_PENDING\n                || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n                throw new BaseException(\"Seat removal not allowed\", \"SEAT_REMOVAL_NOT_ALLOWED\", HttpStatus.CONFLICT,\n                    Map.of(\"lockState\", seat.getLockState().name())) {\n                };\n            }\n            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n            seat.release(LockReleaseReason.USER_REMOVED);\n            seatRepository.save(seat);\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.USER_REMOVED.name(), null);\n        } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n            gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\n            });\n        }\n\n        cart.removeItem(item);\n        cartItemRepository.delete(item);\n\n        Map<Long, PricingTierDto> tierById = fetchTierMap(cart.getShowSlotId());\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public CartResponse getCart(Long userId, Long cartId) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(cartId);\n        }\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, fetchTierMap(cart.getShowSlotId()));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CartResponse confirm(Long userId, Long orgId, ConfirmCartRequest request) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(request.cartId()).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId()));\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId());\n        }\n        cart.ensurePending();\n        if (cart.isExpired(Instant.now())) {\n            throw new CartExpiredException(cart.getId(), cart.getExpiresAt());\n        }\n\n        List<PricingTierDto> tiers = cartPricingService.getSlotPricingCached(cart.getShowSlotId());\n        Map<Long, PricingTierDto> tierById = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(PricingTierDto::tierId, Function.identity()));\n        SlotSummaryDto slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(cart.getShowSlotId());\n\n        Set<Long> expiredSeatIds = cart.getItems().stream()\n            .map(CartItem::getSeatId)\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\n            .filter(seatId -> !seatLockRedisService.isOwnedBy(seatId, userId))\n            .collect(Collectors.toSet());\n        if (!expiredSeatIds.isEmpty()) {\n            throw new SoftLockExpiredException(expiredSeatIds);\n        }\n\n        Map<String, Long> ticketClassToTier = tierById.values().stream()\n            .filter(t -> t.ebTicketClassId() != null)\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(PricingTierDto::ebTicketClassId, PricingTierDto::tierId, (a, b) -> a));\n\n        for (String ticketClassId : cart.getItems().stream().map(CartItem::getEbTicketClassId).collect(Collectors.toSet())) {\n            EbTicketClassResponse ticketClass;\n            try {\n                ticketClass = ebTicketService.getTicketClass(slot.ebEventId(), ticketClassId);\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n                throw new BaseException(\"Eventbrite unavailable\", \"EB_UNAVAILABLE\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n                    Map.of(\"retryAfterSeconds\", 10)) {\n                };\n            }\n            if (ticketClass != null && \"SOLD_OUT\".equalsIgnoreCase(ticketClass.onSaleStatus())) {\n                Long soldOutTierId = ticketClassToTier.get(ticketClassId);\n                releaseTierLocks(cart, userId, soldOutTierId);\n                List<Map<String, Object>> alternativeTiers = tierById.values().stream()\n                    .filter(t -> !Objects.equals(t.tierId(), soldOutTierId))\n                    .map(t -> Map.<String, Object>of(\"tierId\", t.tierId(), \"tierName\", t.tierName()))\n                    .toList();\n                throw new TierSoldOutException(soldOutTierId, Map.of(\"otherTiers\", alternativeTiers));\n            }\n        }\n\n        for (CartItem item : cart.getItems()) {\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId())\n                    .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat not found\", \"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\"));\n                try {\n                    if (!seatLockRedisService.extend(seat.getId(), userId, HARD_LOCK_TTL)) {\n                        throw new HardLockException(\"Failed to extend Redis lock for seat=\" + seat.getId());\n                    }\n                    SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n                    seat.hardLock(HARD_LOCK_TTL);\n                    seatRepository.save(seat);\n                    writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED, SeatLockEvent.CONFIRM, null, null);\n                } catch (RuntimeException ex) {\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n                    throw ex;\n                }\n            } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                    claim.hardLock(Instant.now().plus(HARD_LOCK_TTL));\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.save(claim);\n                });\n            }\n        }\n\n        cart.extendTtl(HARD_LOCK_TTL);\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\n\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new CartAssembledEvent(\n            cart.getId(),\n            cart.getShowSlotId(),\n            cart.getUserId(),\n            cart.getOrgId(),\n            slot.ebEventId(),\n            cart.getCouponCode()\n        ));\n\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void abandon(Long userId, AbandonCartRequest request) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(request.cartId()).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId()));\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId());\n        }\n\n        for (CartItem item : new ArrayList<>(cart.getItems())) {\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId()).orElse(null);\n                if (seat != null && seat.getLockState() != SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n                    SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n                    seat.release(LockReleaseReason.CART_ABANDONED);\n                    seatRepository.save(seat);\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n                    writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.CART_ABANDONED.name(), null);\n                }\n            } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                    gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\n                });\n            }\n            cart.removeItem(item);\n            cartItemRepository.delete(item);\n        }\n\n        cart.abandon();\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void handlePaymentTimeout(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, Long userId) {\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new PaymentTimeoutEvent(cartId, seatIds, userId));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onBookingConfirmed(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, String orderId, Long userId) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\n        for (Long seatId : seatIds) {\n            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(seatId).orElse(null);\n            if (seat == null) {\n                continue;\n            }\n            if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n                continue;\n            }\n            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n            if (previous == SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED) {\n                seat.markPaymentPending();\n            }\n            seat.confirm(orderId);\n            seatRepository.save(seat);\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seatId, userId);\n            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.CONFIRMED, SeatLockEvent.CONFIRM_PAYMENT, \"ORDER_PLACED\", orderId);\n        }\n        cart.confirm();\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onPaymentFailed(Long cartId, List<Long> seatIds, Long userId) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\n        for (Long seatId : seatIds) {\n            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(seatId).orElse(null);\n            if (seat == null || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.AVAILABLE || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n                continue;\n            }\n            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n            seat.release(LockReleaseReason.PAYMENT_FAILED);\n            seatRepository.save(seat);\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seatId, userId);\n            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.PAYMENT_FAILED.name(), null);\n        }\n        cart.abandon();\n        cartRepository.save(cart);\n    }\n\n    private Cart getOrCreatePendingCart(Long userId, SlotSummaryDto slot, Long orgId, String currency) {\n        return cartRepository.findByUserIdAndShowSlotIdAndStatus(userId, slot.slotId(), CartStatus.PENDING)\n            .orElseGet(() -> {\n                try {\n                    Cart created = new Cart(userId, slot.slotId(), orgId, slot.seatingMode(), SOFT_LOCK_TTL, currency);\n                    return cartRepository.save(created);\n                } catch (DataIntegrityViolationException ex) {\n                    return cartRepository.findByUserIdAndShowSlotIdAndStatus(userId, slot.slotId(), CartStatus.PENDING)\n                        .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\"Pending cart already exists\", \"CART_ALREADY_EXISTS\"));\n                }\n            });\n    }\n\n    private void addReservedSeat(\n        Long userId,\n        Cart cart,\n        Map<Long, PricingTierDto> tierById,\n        AddSeatRequest request,\n        PricingTierDto tier\n    ) {\n        Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(request.seatId())\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat not found\", \"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\"));\n\n        if (!Objects.equals(seat.getShowSlotId(), request.slotId()) || !Objects.equals(seat.getPricingTierId(), request.tierId())) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat does not belong to slot/tier\", \"SEAT_MISMATCH\");\n        }\n\n        AcquireResult result = seatLockRedisService.acquire(seat.getId(), userId, SOFT_LOCK_TTL);\n        if (result == AcquireResult.CONFLICT) {\n            throw new SeatUnavailableException(seat.getId(), conflictResolutionService.alternativesFor(seat));\n        }\n\n        if (result == AcquireResult.ACQUIRED && !seat.isSelectable(Instant.now())) {\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n            throw new SeatUnavailableException(seat.getId(), conflictResolutionService.alternativesFor(seat));\n        }\n\n        try {\n            if (result == AcquireResult.ACQUIRED) {\n                SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n                seat.softLock(userId, SOFT_LOCK_TTL);\n                seatRepository.save(seat);\n                writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.SOFT_LOCKED, SeatLockEvent.SELECT, null, null);\n            }\n\n            if (!cartItemRepository.existsByCartIdAndSeatId(cart.getId(), seat.getId())) {\n                CartItem item = new CartItem(\n                    seat.getId(),\n                    null,\n                    seat.getPricingTierId(),\n                    seat.getEbTicketClassId(),\n                    tier.price(),\n                    1\n                );\n                cart.addItem(item);\n                cartItemRepository.save(item);\n            }\n        } catch (RuntimeException ex) {\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n            throw new SeatLockException(\"DB failure while soft-locking seat=\" + seat.getId());\n        }\n    }\n\n"
  }
}

(!cartItemRepository.existsByCartIdAndSeatId(cart.getId(), seat.getId())) {\n                CartItem item = new CartItem(\n                    seat.getId(),\n                    null,\n                    seat.getPricingTierId(),\n                    seat.getEbTicketClassId(),\n                    tier.price(),\n                    1\n                );\n                cart.addItem(item);\n                cartItemRepository.save(item);\n            }\n        } catch (RuntimeException ex) {\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n            throw new SeatLockException(\"DB failure while soft-locking seat=\" + seat.getId());\n        }\n    }\n\n"
  }
}
```
